name: chart-area-linear
visual_summary: The Chart Area Linear component is a reusable UI block that displays a linear chart with a defined area. Developers would use this component to showcase progress, sales data, or other metric-based information on a website or application. It typically consists of a bar or line chart with interactive functionality.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-area-linear
Description: The Chart Area Linear component is a reusable UI block that displays a linear chart with a defined area. Developers would use this component to showcase progress, sales data, or other metric-based information on a website or application. It typically consists of a bar or line chart with interactive functionality.
Style: e.g. material, modern, flat
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, animated
Tags: chart, linear, progress, metric, visualisation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
